ERROR.PASSWORD_POLICY: Password must include 1 special character, 1 uppercase, 1 lowercase, 1 digit, should not be the username, and should have a minimum length of 12.
ERROR.MAX_LOGIN_ATTEMPTS: Maximum login attempts has reached. Please try after sometime.
ERROR.MAX_SIGNUP_ATTEMPTS: Maximum signup attempts reached. Please try after sometime.
ERROR.INVALID_URL: Invalid URL. Supported protocol and port are https and 443. Please make sure spaces are not allowed before and after the URL.
ERROR.DEFAULT_URL_MESSAGE: is a default URL for all products in this Application. Please select country and product to add a specific URL.
ERROR.PRODUCT_NOT_APPROVED_INS: Either product is not added or not approved. Please add product and approve first.
ERROR.PIN_ALREADY_SET: Your pin is already set in the system. To reset the pin, kindly contact the country support team.
ERROR.TRANSACTION_ENQUIRY_NOTE: In Transaction Enquiry API, currently for all in-progress transactions we provide TIP status in response. If this button is enabled, a new status TE (Transaction Expired) will be provided in the response if the user has not responded with either approval/rejection on USSD Push. This will reduce the number of failure transactions. To know the exact status and code, please refer collection payment in the documentation section.
ERROR.PIN_NUMBER_ONLY: Only numbers are allowed in pin.
ERROR.PIN_SET_SUCCESS: Your pin is set in the system successfully. Please save this pin for future purposes. To reset the pin, contact the support team.
ERROR.INVALID_CRED: Invalid Username or Password. Please retry!!
ERROR.AUTO_GENERATED: Please paste the generated bearer token
ERROR.FOLLOW_STEPS: Follow the easy steps to take your application live.
ERROR.IP_Whitelisting_Info: IP Whitelisting has been made mandatory for all the products for all countries. Please make sure this configuration is updated properly on below path
ERROR.IP_Whitelisting_Note: If this is an existing application, please make sure the existing servers ips from which the traffic is coming to this portal are configured properly, otherwise the traffic will be blocked from servers which are not white listed here.
ERROR.ALLOW_ADDITIONAL_MSG: Are you sure you want to perform this operation. This operation can't be rolled back.

OTP_DIALOG.HEADER: Sending OTP to registered email id. If it is taking time more than usual please close this and try again.
OTP_DIALOG.OTP_ERROR_MESSAGE: Sending OTP to registered email id. If it is taking time more than usual please close this and try again.
OTP_DIALOG.EMAIL_MSG: Your code was sent to you via email
OTP_DIALOG.UPDATE_CRED_MSG: By proceeding, your client credentials will be updated. The old credentials will be permanently discarded and will no longer be valid. To complete this update, you will be required to verify your identity through OTP verification.

JOURNEY.heading: Developer Portal Journey
JOURNEY.tooltip: Click to explore the Dev Portal journey!
JOURNEY.label: Portal Journey

JourneySteps.title: Register Your Application
JourneySteps.description: Start by creating your first application to access APIs. Click on 'Register Application'.

JourneySteps.title: Register Your Application
JourneySteps.description: Fill in your application's name and description. Then click 'Submit'.

JourneySteps.title: View Your Applications
JourneySteps.description: After registering, view all your applications here. Click on an app to manage credentials and settings.

JourneySteps.title: Add IP to Whitelist
JourneySteps.description: Protect your app by allowing only trusted IPs. Go to 'Settings' to whitelist IPs.

JourneySteps.title: Add IP to Whitelist
JourneySteps.description: Enter the IP address in the 'Server IP Allowed List' and click 'Add'.

JourneySteps.title: Add IP to Whitelist
JourneySteps.description: Enter the IP address in the 'Server IP Allowed List' and click 'Add'.

JourneySteps.title: Add Product Access
JourneySteps.description: Select the product you want to use, then click 'Add' to begin setup.

JourneySteps.title: Add Product Access
JourneySteps.description: Click 'Yes, Add to {COUNTRY}' to confirm.

JourneySteps.title: Manage Your Products
JourneySteps.description: All added products will appear in 'My Products'. Track and manage them here.

JourneySteps.title: Manage Your Products
JourneySteps.description: Click 'Settings' to manage versions and other configurations.

JourneySteps.title: Manage Your Products
JourneySteps.description: Once your product request is approved by the Admin, the status will change to 'Approved'.

JourneySteps.title: Key Management
JourneySteps.description: Once the product request is approved by the Admin, user credentials can be seen here to generate the authentication token.

JourneySteps.title: Key Management
JourneySteps.description: The number of views is limited. However, you can update credentials anytime by verifying yourself through a one-time password (OTP).

JourneySteps.title: Update Settings
JourneySteps.description: Access 'Settings' to modify application and product configurations.

JourneySteps.title: Add Callback URL
JourneySteps.description: Choose the product and callback type, enter the callback URL, and click 'Add'.

JourneySteps.title: Add Callback Authentication
JourneySteps.description: Enable 'Callback Authentication' to get a hash key for secure communication.

JourneySteps.title: Enable Message Signing
JourneySteps.description: For authenticity and integrity, enable 'Message Signing' for selected products.

JourneySteps.title: Add PIN
JourneySteps.description: Set a 4-digit PIN for product authentication. Choose a product, then click 'Set PIN'.

JourneySteps.title: Add PIN
JourneySteps.description: Enter and confirm your PIN, then click 'Submit'.

JourneySteps.title: Allow Additional Code
JourneySteps.description: For selected products, this feature allows additional status and code in transaction enquiries.

JourneySteps.title: Allow Additional Code
JourneySteps.description: The change is irreversible. Click 'Enable' to allow this.

JourneySteps.title: Explore Documentation
JourneySteps.description: Learn integration steps through our API guides, examples, and tutorials.

JourneySteps.title: Explore Documentation
JourneySteps.description: Understand how to use our APIs effectively through in-depth documentation.

JourneySteps.title: Go Live
JourneySteps.description: After Admin approval, click 'Go Live' to activate product usage.

JourneySteps.title: Go Live
JourneySteps.description: Choose the product, then click 'Submit' to go live.

JourneySteps.title: Go Live
JourneySteps.description: Once approved by the Admin, your product is live and ready to use.

JourneySteps.title: Product Status
JourneySteps.description: The current status of a product, its PIN status, etc. can be viewed here.

JourneySteps.title: Product Status
JourneySteps.description: The current status of a product, its PIN status, etc. can be viewed here.

JourneySteps.title: Sandbox
JourneySteps.description: Use the API sandbox to test product APIs with various requests in a test environment.

JourneySteps.title: Sandbox
JourneySteps.description: Select desired product, api and testcase for request demo.

JourneySteps.title: Sandbox
JourneySteps.description: Fill in the request details and click 'Send' to view responses and expected data.

PAGE_DESCRIPTION.Callback_URL: Specify the endpoint where your application will receive real-time event notifications (e.g., transaction status updates). Ensure this URL is publicly accessible and supports HTTPS for secure communication.
PAGE_DESCRIPTION.Callback_Authentication: A secret key used to generate a hash signature for callback verification. This ensures that the callback messages are from a trusted source and haven't been tampered with during transmission.
PAGE_DESCRIPTION.IPW: Add the IP addresses that are permitted to send requests to your API endpoints. This acts as a security filter to block unauthorized access and should include only your trusted server IPs.
PAGE_DESCRIPTION.Message_Signing: Enable digital signing of messages exchanged with your system to guarantee data integrity and authenticity. This adds a cryptographic signature to requests or responses to prevent tampering.
PAGE_DESCRIPTION.PIN: Configure a static PIN required for certain sensitive operations (e.g., initiating high-risk transactions). This adds an extra layer of security and authentication.
PAGE_DESCRIPTION.Additional_Status: Enable the option to receive extended response statuses and codes during transaction status enquiries. Useful for gaining deeper insights into processing states or error details.
PAGE_DESCRIPTION.Merchant_Type: Select the category that best represents your business (e.g., retail, digital services, utilities). This helps tailor platform features and regulatory requirements to your merchant profile.
